schema.name: getImage
schema.description: Open a local image file only when the user gives a concrete file path or asks you to inspect an image file in the workspace. Prefer project-relative paths like apps/... for project files; never write them as /apps/.... Do not use this for images that are already attached to the current message.

path.description: A concrete path relative to the project root, or a container absolute path under the NDX virtual root. Do not invent paths and do not pass a path for an already attached image.
